E4.name: horizon-extended equal-S floor ladder at m (MANDATORY per A3 gate)
E4.question: Is the equal-S floor sublinearity (p=0.647 at trunk 3000) a bed property or an artifact of the budget-indexed measurement (A3: p_Finf ~ 1.0; the gap is carried by the secular drift b*T2 ~ b/eta, which shrinks as the trunk lengthens and the backbone flattens)?
E4.design: m recipe bs=48 seed 1337; trunks const 1.5e-3 to 12000 AND 24000 (G3 replay each); 8 rungs eta2 {0.5,1,2,3,4,6,8,15}e-4, T2=round(1.2/eta2) equal-S2; floors via the corrected design window step >= trunk + 0.75*T2; fit_p + 1000-rep residual bootstrap (analyze_floor2 pipeline; train_floor2.py --trunk_len)

verdicts.H_PERSIST: p(12k) and p(24k) both within 2x pooled half-width of p(3k)=0.647 with CI upper < 1: sublinearity is horizon-robust; horizon struck from the unlocalized-source list (A2's protocol suspect stays primary)
verdicts.H_DRIFT: p rises monotonically with trunk and p(24k) CI_lower > p(3k) CI_upper: budget-indexing is load-bearing; the shipped 'sublinear' claims are re-scoped to short-horizon beds; if p(24k) CI_lower > 1 the committed clock-rescope prediction (tau0 -> infinity as p crosses 1) becomes testable on this bed
verdicts.H_AMBIG: neither: report as measured, no claim change beyond the A3 conditionality already recorded

E4.power_note: single seed, 8 rungs: expect half-width ~0.04-0.08 (denser-than-bs192 ladder); the A3-implied drift effect (0.647 -> ~1.0) is 5-9x that

E5.name: large-B sign-flip control replication (sharpened by A4)
E5.question: The shipped 'drop arms end worse than controls at B2>=96 (eta2=1e-4)' rests on single-seed (1337) pairs; A4 prices it as a level inversion at B*~86. Do seed-1338 pairs reproduce the sign?
E5.design: train_bladder.py --only with arms b96_e10_s1338, b96_enodrop_s1338, b192_enodrop_s1338 (b192_e10_s1338 exists); trunk s1338 cached (G3-replayed); paired gaps at the A4 common horizon [6000,7000) using smoothed eval

verdicts.CONFIRMED: s1338 gaps positive at BOTH B in {96,192} and within 6e-3 of the s1337 values: single-seed caveat removed from paper/table; A4's level-pricing gains an out-of-sample point
verdicts.RETRACTED: either s1338 gap negative: the shipped 'robust novel observation ... inverts' sentence is retracted to 'seed-dependent'
verdicts.AMBIG: positive but >6e-3 off s1337: caveat stays, magnitudes reported per-seed

dof_note: zero formula DOF in either item
